title: Family care for alzheimer's disease: 11 herbal teas to consider
description: Rosmarinus officinalis teas, also known as rosemary tea, may help with Alzheimer's disease due to its rich content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and terpenoids. These properties help protect the brain from oxidative stress and inflammation, which are common contributors to the progression of Alzheimer's disease. The main constituents of rosemary tea, including carnosic acid, rosmarinic acid, and camphor, have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and neuroprotective effects, potentially ...
